source.document: World Bank Procurement Regulations for IPF Borrowers
source.disclaimer: Thresholds are project-specific and agreed in each project's Procurement Plan. Values shown are TYPICAL for Uganda road infrastructure projects and are ILLUSTRATIVE. Always check the specific project Procurement Plan for applicable thresholds.

works_thresholds.notes: Typical prior review threshold for Uganda infrastructure. Prequalification common for large road contracts. World Bank SBDs mandatory.
Must use acceptable NCB procedures (World Bank reviews national bidding procedures for acceptability). PPDA SBDs may be used if acceptable to World Bank.
Minimum 3 quotations. Post review unless specifically flagged in Procurement Plan. Simplified procedure for small works.

direct_contracting.notes: Always requires World Bank prior review and no-objection. More restrictive than PPDA direct procurement.

force_account.notes: Works carried out by the borrower's own workforce. Requires justification and World Bank approval. Not common for large road contracts.
